ops.body: Shipped 2026-07-11. E2E gate: 150 read-path captures + full help tree byte-identical v0.23.0-vs-v0.24.0 on a fixture with checkpoints/merges/attachments (viz state is server-only and compact is mutating — both verified via the fold oracle, store tests, and golden checkpoint bytes instead of the binary diff). Goldens byte-unchanged at every commit in the range. Release: 7 binaries + SHA256SUMS, tap 0.24.0, capt-hook manifest bumped, after v0.24.0-rc.1 exercised smoke-macos green.
